name: nanoPencil architecture
summary: Terminal-native AI coding agent with TUI, stdio, and RPC modes, built on @pencil-agent packages.
detail: Uses persistent memory, session management (persistence/forking/compaction), and an extension system (interview, loop, link-world, mcp, soul). Core packages: agent-core, ai, tui, mem-core, soul-core.
content: Uses persistent memory, session management (persistence/forking/compaction), and an extension system (interview, loop, link-world, mcp, soul). Core packages: agent-core, ai, tui, mem-core, soul-core.

name: Codebase conventions
summary: Strict P3 headers, AGENTS.md as P1 map, P2 module docs, English-only, conventional commits.
detail: All files use P3 headers (WHO/FROM/TO/HERE). AGENTS.md serves as the primary navigation map. P2 docs list members. Code and user-facing strings must be English-only. Uses conventional commits and progressive disclosure for context.
content: All files use P3 headers (WHO/FROM/TO/HERE). AGENTS.md serves as the primary navigation map. P2 docs list members. Code and user-facing strings must be English-only. Uses conventional commits and progressive disclosure for context.

name: nanoPencil Architecture
summary: Terminal-native AI coding agent with persistent memory, multi-model support, and core session management.
detail: Entry: cli.ts -> main.ts. Core: core/runtime/agent-session.ts (session manager), core/tools/, core/mcp/, core/session/. Modes: interactive, print, rpc. Packages: @pencil-agent/agent-core, ai, tui, mem-core, soul-core.
content: Entry: cli.ts -> main.ts. Core: core/runtime/agent-session.ts (session manager), core/tools/, core/mcp/, core/session/. Modes: interactive, print, rpc. Packages: @pencil-agent/agent-core, ai, tui, mem-core, soul-core.

name: Codebase Conventions
summary: Strict rules: DIP protocol (P1-P3 headers), English only, conventional commits, ~800 lines/file, ~8 files/dir.
detail: Use read/edit tools instead of cat/sed. Never git add -A. All new files need P3 headers. Quality limits enforced.
content: Use read/edit tools instead of cat/sed. Never git add -A. All new files need P3 headers. Quality limits enforced.

name: Config & Build Paths
summary: Config lives in ~/.nanopencil/agent/. Build: npm run build, dev: npx tsx cli.ts, prod: node dist/cli.js.
detail: Key configs: models.json, auth.json, settings.json, sessions/. Bundle deps via scripts/bundle-deps.js.
content: Key configs: models.json, auth.json, settings.json, sessions/. Bundle deps via scripts/bundle-deps.js.

name: Recent Fixes
summary: Fixed interview extension over-triggering and persona switch persistence across sessions.
detail: Added shouldRunInterview heuristics to prevent aggressive firing. Updated session logic to persist persona changes.
content: Added shouldRunInterview heuristics to prevent aggressive firing. Updated session logic to persist persona changes.
